description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the microsoft/dotnet Docker image. Define a job named myasp in the default stage that runs only on the master branch. In the myasp job execute the following shell commands in order: apt-get update, apt-get install lftp, dotnet restore, dotnet publish --configuration Release, mkdir ~/.lftp, printf "set ssl:verify-certificate no;set ftp:use-mdtm off;set ftp:ssl-allow off;" >> ~/.lftp/rc, and lftp -e "mirror --ignore-time -R bin/Release/netcoreapp1.1/publish asp-net-test" -u $FTP_USERNAME,$FTP_PASSWORD $FTP_HOST. The job deploys the published ASP.NET files to an FTP server using lftp, with no caches, artifacts, or services defined.
